name: Advancer Global Limited
summary: Advancer Global Limited, an investment holding company, provides workforce solutions and facilities management services in Singapore. It operates through three segments: Employment Services Business, Building Management Business, and Security Services Business. The Employment Services Business segment offers services for the sourcing, employment, and training of foreign domestic workers for households, as well as foreign workers, corporates, and organizations. The Building Management Business segment provides integrated building facility management services, including property consultancy, property and facilities management, property valuation, investment sales, cleaning and stewarding, waste management, landscape, pest control, and fumigation services to hospitals, hotels, schools, residential, commercial, industrial, and other properties. The Security Services Business segment offers manpower and technology for security solutions and services to commercial, industrial, and residential properties; and security escort services, as well as remote surveillance and security consultancy services, such as crisis management. The company also engages in the business and management consultancy, maid agency, and real estate agency activities; plumbing, heating, and air-conditioning businesses; provision of landscape planting, care, and maintenance services; wholesale of electronic components; and data analytics, processing, and related activities. Advancer Global Limited was incorporated in 2016 and is based in Singapore.
